do: Use the InputField wrapper — it adds label / description / errorMessage / mandatory with correct htmlFor association.
Drive the error look by passing errorMessage (its presence switches the state).
Use leftDecoration / rightDecoration for icons or affixes inside the field.
dont: Don't hand-roll a <label> next to a bare Input — InputField exists for that.
Don't use Input for multi-line text — use textarea (TextareaField).

boundaries: disabled is the only state prop; error is driven by errorMessage presence, not a variant.
mandatory adds the visual asterisk — still add aria-required on the input.

whenToUseInstead.when: a search box with search affordance
